keys.description: Default Branch ULID for a (tenant, organization) tuple. Consumed by `DefaultBranchResolver`. Warmed on first read; invalidated on any BranchDefaultChanged event OR any is_default flip.

The Branch's opening_hours JSONB blob + a pre-computed lookup table of open-periods per day-of-week in `branch.region.timezone`. Consumed by `OpeningHoursEvaluator::isOpenNow()` + the `/hours` + `/is-open` endpoints.

Per-minute is-open cache. Short TTL (55 seconds — one minute minus grace). Cheap to compute but the `/is-open` endpoint gets hit from every session render on the SPA, so caching per-minute-bucket avoids repeated timezone math + exception-scan.

The active branch resolved by `branch.resolve_active` middleware for this (tenant, user) tuple. Written when the caller carries `X-Branch-Id` OR when their default resolves. Idle-timeout matches the Sanctum PAT idle timeout so a session-scoped resolution survives page refreshes without hitting the DB.

The count of active Facility rows referencing this Branch. Used by the branch-list SDUI screen's summary column + by the `saving (status → closed)` dependency check as a fast-path for zero-facilities case.
invalidatedBy: facility::Facility observers (Wave 3, when the module lands)

keys.description: Same pattern for active Teams referencing this Branch.

The geofence-polygon coverage report for this Branch (from the Wave 3 geofencing module). Populated lazily by `OnGeofencePolygonUpdated` — empty in Wave 2. Included here so downstream modules can reserve the key namespace.

Result of a geocode lookup keyed by SHA-256 of the canonical structured address. Cross-tenant cache — same address input yields same coordinates regardless of who asked. Long TTL because geocoding results rarely change and provider costs are per-call.
The platform-wide amenity catalogue loaded from `data/amenity-catalog.json`. Cached on boot; long TTL because the catalogue only changes via code deploy.
invalidatedBy: deploy hook — every deploy invalidates the platform-tag namespace
